name: Prof. Oak

dialogs.script:
say: Welcome to my lab, {player}!
say: See those Pokeballs on the table?
say: Each one contains a different starter Pokemon.
say: Go take a look and come back when you've decided!
lines: See those Pokeballs on the table?
Each one contains a different starter Pokemon.
Go take a look and come back when you've decided!

dialogs.script:
say: Have you decided yet, {player}?
say: Go check the Pokeballs on the table and come back!
lines: Go check the Pokeballs on the table and come back!

dialogs.script:
say: Ah, so you want Bulbasaur!
say: Bulbasaur is a Grass and Poison type.
say: A great choice for a beginner, {player}!
giveitem: bulbasaur 1
setflag: pokemon_chosen
setflag: oak_lab_greeted
clearflag: starter_pending_bulbasaur
say: Take good care of it!
say: Now, go on your adventure!
lines: Bulbasaur is a Grass and Poison type.
A great choice for a beginner, {player}!

dialogs.script:
say: Ah, so you want Charmander!
say: Charmander is a Fire type.
say: It's a tough choice but a fine one, {player}!
giveitem: charmander 1
setflag: pokemon_chosen
setflag: oak_lab_greeted
clearflag: starter_pending_charmander
say: Take good care of it!
say: Now, go on your adventure!
lines: It's a tough choice but a fine one, {player}!

dialogs.script:
say: Ah, so you want Squirtle!
say: Squirtle is a Water type.
say: Excellent taste, {player}!
giveitem: squirtle 1
setflag: pokemon_chosen
setflag: oak_lab_greeted
clearflag: starter_pending_squirtle
say: Take good care of it!
say: Now, go on your adventure!

say: You've already chosen your partner, {player}!
say: Now get out there and start your adventure!
lines: Now get out there and start your adventure!

dialog: See those Pokeballs on the table?
Each one contains a different starter Pokemon.
Go take a look and come back when you've decided!
